prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约1999→3214→4769→4590→6682，整体呈持续大幅后移趋势，近4年累计后移约4683名；2025年基准约6682名，较2024年大幅后移约209 2名，反映财经类在理科生中报考热度持续降温；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2023年均为29人，2024年增至33人，2025年维持33人；2026年计划34人，较2 025年小幅扩招1人（+3.0%），扩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第35名，近年稳定在33–35名区间，属于全国顶尖财 经类院校；2026年声誉评价未出现明显负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第99位（评价“一般”），短视频曝光量偏低，未出现报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中 未见上海财经大学相关断档信号；第五轮学科评估：工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，共4个A-及以上学科，财经学科实力全国顶尖。
6. 【专业热度与环境】金融/财经/经济大类2024年热度指数65.49（分化观望），较2023年小幅升温但整体仍呈分化态势；会计/财务/审计2024年热度指数61.31（推荐）；本省2026 年物理类考生估算约268912人（较2025年260429增约3.3%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 上海财经大学2025年在广西招生48 人，占全国总计划1633人的约2.9%，占比稳定；该校位于上海，地域吸引力强，但广西非其生源大省。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招、 物理类考生增加及财经类在理科生中热度降温等多重因素，在2025年基准6682名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约6854名，区间6354–7354名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6354–7354名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（会计学、金融学双学位、统计学类）冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<6354名）可 重点冲刺一档；位次接近区间上限（>7354名）应以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1999 → 3214 → 4769 → 4590 → 6682, showing a continuous and significant downward trend, with a cumulative drop of about 4683 places in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 6682, a sharp drop of about 2092 places from 2024, reflecting the continued cooling of finance and economics majors among science students; the provincial science/physics category plan was 29 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 33 in 2024, and maintained at 33 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 34 students, a slight expansion of 1 student (+3.0%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 33–35 range in recent years, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions; no significant negative public opinion in the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin popularity total ranking 99th (rated 'average'), short video exposure is low, no signs of rising application interest; no historical admission anomalies related to Shanghai University of Finance and Economics; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, a total of 4 disciplines rated A- or above, with top national strength in finance and economics disciplines.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] The 2024 popularity index for Finance/Economics/Economics categories is 65.49 (differentiated wait-and-see), slightly warming compared to 2023 but still showing differentiation; Accounting/Finance/Auditing 2024 popularity index is 61.31 (recommended); the estimated number of physics category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 268,912 (an increase of about 3.3% from 260,429 in 2025), with the expansion of examinees intensifying competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics enrolls 48 students in Guangxi in 2025, accounting for about 2.9% of the total national plan of 1,633, a stable proportion; the university is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal, but Guangxi is not its major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous significant downward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, the increase in physics category examinees, and the cooling popularity of finance and economics among science students, the ranking is expected to continue to drop based on the 2025 baseline of 6682; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6854, with a range of 6354–7354.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6354–7354, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Accounting, Finance Double Degree, Statistics Class) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<6354), focus on Tier 1; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>7354), prioritize Tier 3 with Tier 2 as supplementary.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 414 → 588 → 557 → 800 → 694, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2024, it significantly moved back to after 800, and in 2025, it rebounded to 694, with a fluctuation range of about 106 places in the last two years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 694 places; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 11 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 13 in 2024, and further increased to 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 14, a reduction of 1 (-6.7%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 33–35 range in recent years, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions; no significant negative public opinion in the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin heat total ranking 99th (rated 'average'), with low short video exposure; no related gap signals in historical admission anomaly records for Shanghai University of Finance and Economics; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, totaling 4 A- and above disciplines, with top national strength in finance and economics disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
The 2024 heat index for finance/economics/economy majors was 65.49 (differentiated wait-and-see), slightly warming compared to 2023; the estimated number of history category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 123,088 (an increase of about 3.3% from 119,153 in 2025), with the expansion of examinees intensifying competition.
7. [Regional Factor] Shanghai University of Finance and Economics enrolled 48 students in Guangxi in 2025, accounting for about 2.9% of the total national plan of 1,633, a stable proportion; the university is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal for liberal arts students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, and the increase in history category examinees, the easing effect of the reduction and the competitive effect of the increase in examinees partially offset each other; based on the 2025 baseline of 694, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 676, with a range of 574–778.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 574–778, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Finance, Financial Management) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<574), you can focus on Tier 1; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>778), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2.
